steps.title: Identify the reanalysis finding
steps.content: The crucial signal is that Goldschmied found “no evidence that red uniformed teams are more likely than other teams to win.” This directly contradicts the Attrill study's explanation for Manchester United's success.

steps.title: Complete the sentence logically
steps.content: Manchester United's home success was not caused by wearing red; their performance would have remained roughly the same without the red uniforms. The other choices introduce unrelated factors or contradict the reanalysis finding. That matches choice A — A is correct.
